description: The 'Ndrina Condello is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Villa San Giovanni, and Fiumara, Italy. It is involved in drug and arms trafficking, contract rigging, and extortion rackets. The clan was led by Pasquale Condello until his arrest in 2008, and later by Domenico Condello until his arrest in 2012. It participated in the Second 'Ndrangheta war against the De Stefano clan.
